omitted_declarations.policy_reference: We use personal information of users within the scopes mentioned in "Collecting Personal Information & Its Purpose". We do not use personal information of users beyond those scopes without the consent of users, or share with external parties. However, for social log-in, we may share information in order to process social log-in.
